rationale: Surface shape: CWE-787 unbounded memcpy into a fixed 128B stack buffer. Gated by `capable(CAP_SYS_RAWIO)`. /dev/mem direct access grants arbitrary kmem read/write; subsumes memory-corruption primitive. Axis-4 (capability_check) detects the cap call site. Constant `CAP_SYS_RAWIO` IS in _PRIVILEGED_CAP_CONSTANTS → verdict policy emits NOT_EXPLOITABLE.
